[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: The image shows a dark blue profile-style interface with a circular avatar on the left and several labeled status boxes in the center-right.

Main Subject:
A computer UI screen displays the text “hkmnn” at the top, an avatar circle on the left containing a dark cat-like character with a yellowish face and black eye area, and two pill-shaped status panels in the middle-right: one red-bordered panel reading “LIMIT 3/5” and one teal-bordered panel reading “LEVEL GRUP Lv 1.”

Setting:
The scene is a digital interface on a dark, gradient background with faint, large circular shapes; the lighting is uniform and screen-like, with no real-world setting visible.

Visual Details:
The overall color palette is navy blue and dark blue with subtle lighter-blue circles as a background pattern. The main container is a rounded rectangle with a thin light border. The avatar is inside a circular frame with a light border and shows a small figure wearing a light-colored cap or helmet-like shape. Center-top text is white, with a smaller gray handle-like line beneath it. A gray pill button labeled “FREE USER” sits under the handle. The “LIMIT” panel is red-outlined with red accent marks, and the “LEVEL GRUP” panel is teal-outlined with a teal star icon. At the bottom center, there is faint gray text.

Visible Text:
hkmnn
@6281374279390
FREE USER
LIMIT
3/5
LEVEL GRUP
Lv 1
Hutoa Assister [1] · Premium Profile System

Practical Summary:
This image is a screenshot of a dark-themed profile UI with a username, handle, and two status indicators for limits and level. It also includes a circular avatar and a gray “FREE USER” label on the interface.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
